mainEntity.name: Idaho vs Utah ladder fall workers' comp differences for Boise/Murray?
mainEntity.text: Idaho vs Utah ladder fall workers' comp differences for Boise/Murray?

acceptedAnswer.text: Idaho: 91% AWW max $1,100/wk, 312-wk TTD limit. Utah: 66 2/3% max $1,200/wk, no TTD cap. Both 1-yr filing.

suggestedAnswer.text: Boise cross-border workers choose home state coverage. Utah better for chronic injuries; Idaho stricter PPD schedules. Murray firms advise dual-state strategy.

name: Idaho vs Utah Comp for Ladder Falls
description: Idaho: 91% AWW max $1,100/wk, 312-wk TTD limit. Utah: 66 2/3% max $1,200/wk, no TTD cap. Both 1-yr filing.
